title: Here's How Samsung Achieved a Virtually Crease-Free Screen on the Galaxy Z Fold 8
summary: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Fold 8 Ultra use titanium in the display . Samsung made a big deal about the security-minded screen tech when it debuted the Galaxy S26 Ultra earlier this year.
